query:
SELECT 
  pb.id, pb.batch_code, pb.period_start, pb.period_end, 
  pb.total_amount, pb.total_workers, pb.status,
  COUNT(pbi.id) as items_count
FROM payroll_batches pb
LEFT JOIN payroll_batch_items pbi ON pb.id = pbi.batch_id
WHERE pb.batch_code = 'Batch-2026-02-001'
GROUP BY pb.id;
